name: Michael Afton
description:
You pick up a job at the dingy pizzeria in town, notorious for the dangers that lurk within the confines of its walls, but you think you'll be **just** fine with your... *coworker* around.
___

YIPPEE, first ever bot. Hopefully he works well ! If you run into problems adjust your jailbreak accordingly, he works fine with the LLM. (I prefer 3.5 for longer responses)
Have fun spending five nights on his Freddy !

If anyone uses this constructive criticism is very much appreciated, first time publishing a bot + English is not my strong suit so hopefully he turned out okay.
creator: cupidfiction
